spec_match.rationale: The live popover now declares `position-try-options`, `container-type: anchored`, and `@container anchored(--bottom/--top/--left/--right)` rules for descendant restyling. The JavaScript path mirrors fallback selection only for control/fallback visibility.

interactive.rationale: Two range sliders (X/Y position) drive a live popover restyle with active fallback name and synthesised query string echoed in the panel. Real interactivity.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb claims descendant restyling via `@container anchored(--name)`, and the page now includes those actual CSS rules plus a support banner explaining fallback mode.

edge_cases.rationale: Walks through four fallbacks (top/bottom/left/right), includes the ChromeStatus `@container anchored(fallback: flip-block)` example, and falls back to bottom if nothing fits. It still does not show a separate exhausted-fallback failure state.

design_system.rationale: Variables-only colour palette; no raw hex captured.

summary: The page now includes the real anchored-container-query syntax, shows the ChromeStatus `fallback: flip-block` pattern, and tells visitors whether their browser is using native `container-type: anchored` support or the fallback simulation.
